case_title: MENFIL BERNABE CASTANON LOPEZ VS. MARIA DEL CARMEN TOLEDANO MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-30-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY CASTANON LOPEZ, MENFIL BERNABE AS TO DEFENDANT TOLEDANO MARTINEZ, MARIA DEL CARMEN AKA MARIA TOLENTINO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER ON CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MENFIL BERNABE CASTANON LOPEZ. DEFENDANT MARIA DEL CARMEM TOLEDANO MARTINEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WANTED TO TERMINATE THE CASE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
